commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: Testing Slow Tests in Autotest
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: Testing Slow Tests in Autotest

Can we test for SLOW tests in autotest. Emptied SLOW test list from
all the test suites which had SLOW tests mentioned in them.

Signed-off-by: Saurabh Tandan <saurabh.tandan@intel.com>
Change-Id: Ia1874de334a03dcb44e94805fe020a0dd6095a76
